data.label: WCDB
data.description: 由微信团队开发并已在 GitHub 上开源的业界领先终端数据库。它全面支持 C++、Java、Kotlin、Swift 和 Objc 五种开发语言，覆盖 Android、iOS、macOS、Windows、Linux 及鸿蒙 Next 六大终端平台，并提供数据备份、修复、迁移、压缩等多项业界领先的数据管理能力，助力多端应用高效、可靠地实现数据持久化。

data.label: WCDB
data.description: An industry-leading client-side database developed by the WeChat team and open-sourced on GitHub. It fully supports five development languages: C++, Java, Kotlin, Swift, and ObjC. It covers six client platforms: Android, iOS, macOS, Windows, Linux, and HarmonyOS Next, and provides industry-leading data management capabilities such as data backup, repair, migration, and compression, helping multi-platform applications implement data persistence efficiently and reliably.
